title: Correct Banner Paterns
description: This resource pack adds a picture to each pattern to make them easier to distinguish.
body:
## Archive

The project is archived because Mojang already added different textures to the items in version 1.21.2.

## Description

This resource pack adds a picture to each pattern to make them easier to distinguish. Each picture shows which pattern the player is holding.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c95839c1dd128591ccaaf1cc76fb15cd95f16f2.png)
